title: Timing, Resource Graphs, Transfer, Caching, and User-Performance Boundaries · Traceback Repair Bay
summary: A preserved crawl trace contains one plausible authorization, URL, robots, HTTP, decoding, parser, selector, frontier, concurrency, metadata, accessibility, privacy, export, browser, or release defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in bounded page-resource and timing audit and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugg…
objectives: Separate queue, DNS, connect, TLS, request, first-byte, body, parse, render, and total timing with clock and instrumentation limits.
Classify document, stylesheet, script, image, font, media, API, iframe, preload, and redirect resources with initiator and origin.
Reconcile compressed transfer, decoded body, cached reuse, duplicate URLs, variant keys, and large-resource policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

steps.title: Authorized crawling and Python Order the regression proof · Debug User Performance Boundary
steps.instruction:
Order the User Performance Boundary Authorized crawling and Python authorization-to-recovery evidence cycle for this debug task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Authorized crawling and Python Order the regression proof · Debug User Performance Boundary.
steps.why: Correct order keeps User Performance Boundary assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Authorized crawling and Python Order the regression proof · Debug User Performance Boundary, keep User Performance Boundary connected to executable Python authorization, URL, response, parse, provenance, frontier, report, and recovery decision evidence.

content.text: A debug site-quality team handles case 9402 during a multilingual public-service site review. Build deterministic Python evidence to separate crawler timings, resource graphs, transfer, cache evidence, controlled browser evidence, and user-performance limits; all network and parser work must remain below explicit budgets; then change one base URL, fragment, query, Unicode host, or redirect and reapply scope. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Separate crawler timings, controlled browser lab evidence, field data, accessibility, network profile, device profile, and user experience claims.

steps.title: Authorized crawling and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug User Performance Boundary
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: scraper-user-performance-boundary-17y6mj" that uses case 5421 to separate crawler timings, resource graphs, transfer, cache evidence, controlled browser evidence, and user-performance limits. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not open sockets, resolve DNS, contact sites, import or claim native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, or Playwright behavior, read or write host files, use credentials, launch browsers, schedule host jobs, or claim live accessibility, privacy, legal, load, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, the recorded stable package versions, fixed and malformed fixtures, fake transports, controlled local servers, authorized disposable target sites, representative browser profiles, privacy, security, accessibility and legal review, load, migration, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Authorized crawling and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug User Performance Boundary.

For Authorized crawling and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug User Performance Boundary, keep User Performance Boundary connected to executable Python authorization, URL, response, parse, provenance, frontier, report, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-user-performance-boundary-17y6mj
# Competency: scraper-user-performance-boundary.
# Case 5421: a clean package and recovery drill.
# Operating constraint: automated findings must not claim ranking or WCAG conformance.
# Changed case: change malformed markup or parser choice and preserve extraction provenance.
def evidence_scraper_user_performance_boundary_17y6mj(pages: int = 12, resources: int = 180, transfer_bytes: int = 2400000, expanded_bytes: int = 6700000, user_experience_claims: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_17y6mj = "17y6mj-jm6y71-5421"
    assert evidence_variant_17y6mj
    evidence_axes_17y6mj = (
        "authorization17y6mj",
        "url5421",
        "responsejm6y71",
        "tree17y6mj5421",
        "frontier542117y6mj",
        "reportjm6y715421",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_17y6mj)) == 6
    if pages < 1 or resources < pages:
        return False, resources, "resource-count"
    if transfer_bytes < 0 or expanded_bytes < transfer_bytes:
        return False, expanded_bytes, "transfer-accounting"
    if user_experience_claims > 0:
        return False, user_experience_claims, "user-performance-overclaim"
    if resources > 1000:
        return False, resources, "resource-budget"
    assert expanded_bytes >= transfer_bytes and user_experience_claims == 0
    return True, resources, "bounded-resource-audit"
